Post-doctoral position for TREATMi project, Kadir Has University

As Kadir Has University, we are pleased to offer

post-doctoral researcher position

to join the

TREATMi

project (

Doctors on the move: Transnational Research into Healthcare Migration

), a grant jointly funded by Volkswagen Foundation, Novo Nordisk Foundation, and Wellcome. The project is coordinated by

Humboldt University

(the Berlin Institute for Empirical Integration and Migration Research – BIM),

Kadir Has University

(Asst. Prof. Sibel Karadağ) and

Izmir University of Economics

The research project, which is eligible for funding within the scope of Phase 1 will start in August 2024 and will employ full-time post-doc researcher for 7 months. As of March 2025, it will be eligible to move on to the long-term Phase 2.

Job Description

The post-doc researcher will work on her/his research supervised by Asst. Prof. Sibel Karadağ in collaboration with other partner institutions. The project TREATMi addresses the growing trend of medical doctors migrating from countries like Iran and Turkey to destinations such as Germany. The project aims to understand the drivers and consequences of this phenomenon comprehensively.

In the Phase 1, the research position will include

Actively contributing to the TREATMi project to accomplish the exploratory research plan for 7 months. In the pilot-phase, the post-doc researcher will take an active role in the preparation of feasibility and scope of the main project.

Conducting qualitative interviews among stakeholders in the healthcare system in Istanbul, Izmir and Ankara.

Conducting online survey to identify feasible access points for fieldwork during the main project phase.

Participating in and facilitating national and international networks in healthcare system to identify potential collaboration/implementation partners, particularly NGOs and NPOs working in the Turkish, Iranian and German healthcare sectors.

Gathering insights into issues, knowledge gaps and needs among the healthcare community to be included in the final project.

Preparation of the main proposal by March 2025.

Required qualifications for candidates

a track research record in the fields of migration or related areas

a publication record

mastery in comparative, qualitative and/or quantitative research methods

experience in field research

organizational skills and proven experience working in international projects

Application process

A letter of motivation (max. 800 words) explaining how the candidate fulfills each of the qualifications mentioned

A copy of CV (including publications)

Names of two referees (reference letters are not required at this stage)

Applicants should send a single PDF by combining all required documents to

[email protected]

by

July 28, 2024

. Applicants should also name their two referees in their emails. Please refer to the subject line “

TREATMi Post-doc Application

” in your email. Candidates will be informed in the first week of August.

Start date

August 2024

Duration

Full-time position for 7 months (extendible in case of Phase 2)

Salary

The candidate will work full time based in Kadir Has University (Istanbul), for a duration of 7 months starting August 2024 with a gross monthly salary following international project standards. The monthly salary will also include Kadir Has additional life support.
